jutsus.name: Rasengan
jutsus.description: A spinning sphere of chakra formed in the palm of the hand. One of the most iconic jutsu in the series.

jutsus.name: Shadow Clone Jutsu
jutsus.description: Creates physical copies of the user that can independently act and share memories upon dispersal.

jutsus.name: Chidori
jutsus.description: A hand of concentrated lightning chakra used as a high-speed thrusting attack. Also known as One Thousand Birds.

jutsus.name: Amaterasu
jutsus.description: Black flames summoned from the Mangekyo Sharingan that burn anything in the user's sight and cannot be extinguished.

jutsus.name: Tsukuyomi
jutsus.description: An extremely powerful genjutsu that traps the target in an illusory world controlled entirely by the user.

jutsus.name: Susanoo
jutsus.description: A massive humanoid construct of chakra that surrounds the user, acting as both weapon and ultimate defense.

jutsus.name: Kotoamatsukami
jutsus.description: The most powerful genjutsu in existence. Rewrites a target's mind so completely they believe they acted of their own free will.

jutsus.name: Izanagi
jutsus.description: A forbidden Sharingan technique that allows the user to rewrite reality, turning injuries and death into illusions at the cost of their eye.

jutsus.name: Izanami
jutsus.description: A forbidden Sharingan technique that traps the target in an infinite loop of sensory experiences, forcing self-reflection.

jutsus.name: Flying Thunder God Technique
jutsus.description: A space-time ninjutsu that allows instantaneous teleportation to any location marked with the user's special seal.

jutsus.name: Reanimation Jutsu (Edo Tensei)
jutsus.description: A forbidden jutsu that summons the souls of the dead back into the living world using a living sacrifice as a vessel.

jutsus.name: Eight Gates
jutsus.description: A technique that forces open the chakra limiters within the body, granting enormous power at the cost of the user's health and life.

jutsus.name: Shadow Possession Jutsu
jutsus.description: Extends the user's shadow to merge with a target's shadow, forcing them to mimic every movement the user makes.

jutsus.name: Gentle Fist
jutsus.description: A taijutsu style exclusive to the Hyuga clan that uses the Byakugan to strike chakra points and disrupt the enemy's chakra flow.

jutsus.name: Byakugan
jutsus.description: A dojutsu kekkei genkai that grants near 360-degree vision, the ability to see chakra networks, and see through solid objects.

jutsus.name: Sharingan
jutsus.description: The Uchiha clan's dojutsu that allows the user to copy jutsu, see through genjutsu, and predict movements with enhanced perception.

jutsus.name: Mangekyo Sharingan
jutsus.description: An evolved form of the Sharingan awakened through trauma. Grants access to unique and devastating techniques for each user.

jutsus.name: Rinnegan
jutsus.description: The most powerful of the Three Great Dojutsu. Grants access to all five nature transformations and the Six Paths techniques.

jutsus.name: Six Paths of Pain
jutsus.description: Six corpses reanimated by Nagato's Rinnegan, each controlling a different path of power including gravity, summoning, and absorption.

jutsus.name: Almighty Push (Shinra Tensei)
jutsus.description: A Rinnegan technique that repels everything in the user's vicinity with an enormous burst of force.

jutsus.name: Universal Pull (Bansho Tenin)
jutsus.description: A Rinnegan technique that draws everything toward the user with irresistible attractive force.

jutsus.name: Sage Mode
jutsus.description: A state achieved by perfectly balancing the user's chakra with natural energy, dramatically enhancing all physical and jutsu capabilities.

jutsus.name: Nine-Tails Chakra Mode
jutsus.description: A transformation where Naruto works in harmony with Kurama, cloaking himself in golden chakra and gaining tremendous power.

jutsus.name: Baryon Mode
jutsus.description: The most powerful form of Naruto and Kurama's combined power. Consumes both their chakra as fuel and drains the life force of anyone touched.

jutsus.name: Wood Release
jutsus.description: A rare kekkei genkai that combines Earth and Water releases to create and manipulate living wood structures of any size.

jutsus.name: Dust Release
jutsus.description: A kekkei tota that combines three nature transformations to create structures that disintegrate everything within them at the molecular level.

jutsus.name: Lava Release
jutsus.description: Combines Fire and Earth releases to produce and manipulate molten rock with extreme destructive capability.

jutsus.name: Ice Release
jutsus.description: Combines Water and Wind releases to create and manipulate ice. Haku's mastery allowed him to create his famous Crystal Ice Mirrors.

jutsus.name: Storm Release
jutsus.description: Combines Lightning and Water releases to fire laser-like beams of light-infused water that can be guided freely.

jutsus.name: Boil Release
jutsus.description: Combines Fire and Water releases to produce a corrosive mist that can melt almost anything it comes into contact with.

jutsus.name: Scorch Release
jutsus.description: Combines Fire and Wind releases to generate orbs of heat that evaporate all moisture from a target's body.

jutsus.name: Explosion Release
jutsus.description: Combines Earth and Lightning releases to infuse chakra into matter and trigger powerful explosions.

jutsus.name: Summoning Jutsu
jutsus.description: A space-time technique that transports a contracted creature to the user's location instantly using blood and hand seals.

jutsus.name: Rasengan â€” Wind Style: Rasenshuriken
jutsus.description: An evolved Rasengan infused with wind chakra that takes the form of a massive shuriken, capable of severing chakra pathways at a cellular level.

jutsus.name: Chidori Sharp Spear
jutsus.description: An extension of the Chidori that stretches the lightning chakra into a long spear shape for long-range piercing attacks.

jutsus.name: Lightning Armor
jutsus.description: Wraps the user's body in lightning chakra to enhance speed and reflexes to superhuman levels while electrocuting anyone who makes contact.

jutsus.name: Sand Manipulation
jutsus.description: Gaara's unique ability to control sand as both a weapon and a near-impenetrable shield, acting autonomously to protect him.

jutsus.name: Sand Coffin
jutsus.description: Gaara encases a target in sand and then crushes them with his Sand Waterfall Funeral technique.

jutsus.name: Puppet Technique
jutsus.description: Uses chakra threads to control puppets loaded with hidden weapons and mechanisms as extensions of the user's combat ability.

jutsus.name: Explosive Clay
jutsus.description: Deidara's unique technique of infusing clay with explosive chakra to sculpt living bombs of any shape or size.

jutsus.name: C4 Karura
jutsus.description: Deidara's ultimate bomb that releases microscopic clay particles which enter the body and detonate from within.

jutsus.name: Hydrification Technique
jutsus.description: The Hozuki clan's ability to liquify their entire body, making them immune to physical attacks and able to reshape themselves freely.

jutsus.name: Mind Transfer Jutsu
jutsus.description: Transfers the user's consciousness into a target's body, allowing them to take full control of their actions.

jutsus.name: Multi-Size Technique
jutsus.description: The Akimichi clan technique that expands the user's body to enormous proportions by converting calories into chakra.

jutsus.name: Bug Clone Technique
jutsus.description: Creates a clone made entirely of insects from the Aburame clan's kikaichÅ« bug colony.

jutsus.name: Fang Over Fang
jutsus.description: Kiba and Akamaru spin at high speed like drills to deliver devastating rotating strikes.

jutsus.name: Paper Shuriken
jutsus.description: Konan transforms her body and surroundings into billions of paper sheets used as weapons, shields, and explosives.

jutsus.name: Dead Demon Consuming Seal
jutsus.description: A forbidden sealing jutsu that summons the Death God to rip out and seal a target's soul, at the cost of the user's own soul.

jutsus.name: Eight Trigrams Sixty-Four Palms
jutsus.description: A Hyuga clan taijutsu that strikes 64 chakra points in rapid succession to completely shut down a target's chakra flow.

jutsus.name: Primary Lotus
jutsus.description: A powerful taijutsu technique that opens the first of the Eight Gates to deliver a crushing aerial slam.

jutsus.name: Drunken Fist
jutsus.description: An unpredictable taijutsu style that mimics the swaying movements of a drunk person, making attacks impossible to predict.

jutsus.name: Water Dragon Jutsu
jutsus.description: Creates a large dragon-shaped torrent of water that crashes into enemies with tremendous force.

jutsus.name: Water Prison Jutsu
jutsus.description: Traps a target inside an inescapable sphere of water while the user maintains contact to sustain it.

jutsus.name: Hidden Mist Jutsu
jutsus.description: Creates a thick mist to reduce visibility to zero, allowing the user to move and attack undetected.

jutsus.name: Crystal Ice Mirrors
jutsus.description: Creates a dome of ice mirrors that the user can move between at the speed of light to attack from any angle simultaneously.

jutsus.name: Fire Style: Fireball Jutsu
jutsus.description: The Uchiha clan's signature technique. Exhales a massive ball of fire from the mouth after performing hand seals.

jutsus.name: Fire Style: Dragon Flame Jutsu
jutsus.description: Releases a long stream of fire shaped like a dragon toward the target, often used in combination with other techniques.

jutsus.name: Lightning Style: Kirin
jutsus.description: Shapes natural lightning from storm clouds into the form of a mythical beast and guides it toward the target with devastating speed.

jutsus.name: Ink Creation
jutsus.description: Sai draws animals and objects with ink that come to life and carry out his commands as autonomous agents.

jutsus.name: Cursed Seal of Heaven
jutsus.description: A seal applied by Orochimaru that grants the recipient enormous power at the cost of their free will and sanity.

jutsus.name: Snake Technique
jutsus.description: Orochimaru's signature style of summoning snakes and transforming body parts into serpents for both combat and escape.

jutsus.name: Sword of Kusanagi
jutsus.description: A legendary blade summoned from within Orochimaru's body. Can extend and cut through almost any defense.

jutsus.name: Twin Snakes Mutual Death
jutsus.description: A forbidden jutsu that kills both the user and target simultaneously using a seal formed between them.

jutsus.name: Jashin Ritual
jutsus.description: Hidan's immortality-based ritual that links his body to a target, causing any damage he inflicts on himself to be mirrored on the target.

jutsus.name: Earth Grudge Fear
jutsus.description: Kakuzu's forbidden technique that uses black threads to detach and reattach body parts, steal hearts, and use multiple nature transformations simultaneously.

jutsus.name: Kamui
jutsus.description: A Mangekyo Sharingan space-time technique that can warp anything into or out of a pocket dimension at will.

jutsus.name: Infinite Tsukuyomi
jutsus.description: The ultimate genjutsu that uses the moon as a reflector for the Rinne Sharingan to trap all of humanity in an eternal dream.

jutsus.name: Chibaku Tensei
jutsus.description: Creates a black sphere of gravity that draws everything in the surrounding area into it, forming a planetoid of compressed debris.

jutsus.name: Truth-Seeking Ball
jutsus.description: Black spheres of highly compressed chakra that can nullify all ninjutsu and disintegrate anything they touch.

jutsus.name: Healing Jutsu
jutsus.description: Channels chakra into wounds to accelerate cell regeneration and heal injuries ranging from minor cuts to life-threatening damage.

jutsus.name: Creation Rebirth
jutsus.description: Tsunade's ultimate technique that uses stored chakra to regenerate any injury instantly, making her nearly immortal in battle.

jutsus.name: Mystical Palm Technique
jutsus.description: A medical ninjutsu that emits healing chakra from the palms to treat injuries and illnesses with precision.

jutsus.name: Chakra Enhanced Strength
jutsus.description: Concentrates chakra into the fists at the moment of impact, generating explosive physical force far beyond normal human capability.

jutsus.name: Sage Art: Super Tailed Beast Rasenshuriken
jutsus.description: Naruto's most powerful offensive technique combining Sage Mode with multiple Tailed Beast chakra into several massive Rasenshurikens simultaneously.

jutsus.name: Tailed Beast Ball
jutsus.description: A massive sphere of highly compressed positive black chakra and negative white chakra fired by Tailed Beasts and their Jinchuriki.

jutsus.name: Lariat
jutsus.description: A powerful clothesline attack enhanced with lightning chakra. The double version between the Raikage and Killer Bee is nearly unstoppable.

jutsus.name: Sage Art: Wood Release â€” True Several Thousand Hands
jutsus.description: Hashirama's ultimate technique that creates an enormous wooden statue with thousands of hands, dwarfing mountains in scale.

jutsus.name: Particle Style: Atomic Dismantling Jutsu
jutsus.description: Creates a three-dimensional geometric structure that disintegrates everything inside it at the molecular level, leaving nothing behind.

jutsus.name: Wind Style: Vacuum Blade
jutsus.description: Temari channels wind chakra through her giant iron fan to release razor-sharp blades of compressed air.

jutsus.name: Sealing Jutsu: Nine Phantom Dragons
jutsus.description: Summons nine giant dragon heads made of chakra that bind and seal a target completely.
